ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the point */,
  "point_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the point type */,
  "point_value" INTEGER /* Value of the point */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the point was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_point_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_type_id") REFERENCES point_types ("point_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "point_types" (
  "point_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point type */,
  "point_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the point type (e.g., rewards, bonus) */,
  "point_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the point type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control applies to */,
  "control_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access control type */,
  "control_value" TEXT /* Value of the access control (e.g., true, false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_control_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_type_id") REFERENCES control_types ("control_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_types" (
  "control_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control type */,
  "control_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the access control type (e.g., edit, view) */,
  "control_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the access control type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_points" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the total points were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "point_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point change entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the point change applies to */,
  "point_change" INTEGER /* Amount of points changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the point change occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_point_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control change entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control change applies to */,
  "control_change" TEXT /* Type of access control change (e.g., edit, view) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the access control change occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access control change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role applies to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission applies to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., edit, view) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "point_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point exchange entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the point exchange applies to */,
  "points_exchanged" INTEGER /* Number of points exchanged */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date the point exchange occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_point_exchanges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
